name: NetBird Server LXC
description: NetBird Server LXC is a self-hosted zero-trust networking platform that runs the official NetBird Docker Compose stack inside an Alpine container.

notes.text: Requires a public DNS record pointing to the LXC and open ports 80/tcp, 443/tcp, and 3478/udp.
This LXC enables nesting and keyctl so Docker can run inside the container.
The installer uses NetBird's built-in Traefik reverse proxy with automatic Let's Encrypt certificates.
After setup completes, open the configured HTTPS domain and create the first admin account on the /setup page.
